entries.help: If true, normal reprojection from the previous frame is allowed in SceneTexture nodes on DBuffer decals, provided that motion in depth prepass is enabled as well (r.VelocityOutputPass=0). Otherwise the fallback is the normal extracted from the depth buffer.
entries.name: r.Decal.NormalReprojectionEnabled

entries.help: When reading the normal from a SceneTexture node in a DBuffer decal shader, the normal is a mix of the geometry normal (extracted from the depth buffer) and the normal from the reprojected previous frame. When the dot product of the geometry and reprojected normal is below the r.Decal.NormalReprojectionThresholdLow, the geometry normal is used. When that value is above r.Decal.NormalReprojectionThresholdHigh, the reprojected normal is used. Otherwise it uses a lerp between them.
entries.name: r.Decal.NormalReprojectionThresholdHigh

entries.help: When reading the normal from a SceneTexture node in a DBuffer decal shader, the normal is a mix of the geometry normal (extracted from the depth buffer) and the normal from the reprojected previous frame. When the dot product of the geometry and reprojected normal is below the r.Decal.NormalReprojectionThresholdLow, the geometry normal is used. When that value is above r.Decal.NormalReprojectionThresholdHigh, the reprojected normal is used. Otherwise it uses a lerp between them.
entries.name: r.Decal.NormalReprojectionThresholdLow

entries.help: Whether to use a temporal filter

entries.help: World space distance threshold needed to discard last frame's lighting results.  Lower values reduce ghosting from characters when near a wall but increase flickering artifacts.
entries.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.Temporal.DistanceThreshold

entries.help: Size of the trace compaction threadgroup.  Larger group = better coherency in the compacted traces.  Currently only supported by WaveOps path.
entries.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.TraceCompaction.GroupSizeInTraceTiles

entries.help: Whether to use Wave Ops path for trace compaction.
entries.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.TraceCompaction.WaveOps

entries.help: Set to 1 to capture traces from a random wavefront and draw them on the screen. Set to 1 again to re-capture.  Shaders must enable support first, see DEBUG_SUPPORT_VISUALIZE_TRACE_COHERENCY
entries.name: r.Lumen.Reflections.VisualizeTracingCoherency

entries.help: Sample the fog contribution in Lumen tracing. Disabled by default.
entries.name: r.Lumen.SampleFog

entries.help: Whether to use the Screen Probe Final Gather
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather

entries.help: Fraction of uniform probes to allow for adaptive probe placement.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.AdaptiveProbeAllocationFraction

entries.help: Screen probes will be placed where needed down to this downsample factor of the GBuffer.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.AdaptiveProbeMinDownsampleFactor

entries.help: Spherical Harmonic = 0, Importance Sample BRDF = 1, Numerical Integral Reference = 2
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.DiffuseIntegralMethod

entries.help: Whether to render all local lights through Lumen's Final Gather, when enabled.  This gives very cheap but low quality direct lighting.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.DirectLighting

entries.help: Pixel size of the screen tile that a screen probe will be placed on.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.DownsampleFactor

entries.help: Whether to use Wave Ops path for screen probe filtering.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.Filtering.WaveOps

entries.help: If zero or greater, overrides the temporal jitter index with a fixed index.  Useful for debugging and inspecting sampling patterns.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.FixedJitterIndex

entries.help: Size of the full resolution jitter applied to Screen Probe upsampling, as a fraction of a screen tile.  A width of 1 results in jittering by DownsampleFactor number of pixels.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.FullResolutionJitterWidth

entries.help: Number of mip maps to prepare for diffuse integration
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.GatherNumMips

entries.help: Resolution that probe filtering and integration will happen at, as a scale of TracingOctahedronResolution
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.GatherOctahedronResolutionScale

entries.help: Whether to trace against hair depth for hair casting shadow onto opaques.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.HairStrands.ScreenTrace

entries.help: Whether to trace against hair voxel structure for hair casting shadow onto opaques.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.HairStrands.VoxelTrace

entries.help: 0. Software raytracing of diffuse indirect from Lumen cubemap tree.1. Enable hardware ray tracing of diffuse indirect. (Default)
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.HardwareRayTracing

entries.help: Distance to trace with backface culling enabled, useful when the Ray Tracing geometry doesn't match the GBuffer (Nanite Proxy geometry)
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.HardwareRayTracing.AvoidSelfIntersectionTraceDistance

entries.help: Determines the active number of groups (Default = 1)
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.HardwareRayTracing.Default.GroupCount

entries.help: Determines the active number of threads (Default = 32768)
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.HardwareRayTracing.Default.ThreadCount

entries.help: Enables indirect ray tracing dispatch on compatible hardware (Default = 1)
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.HardwareRayTracing.Indirect

entries.help: Bias along the shading normal, useful when the Ray Tracing geometry doesn't match the GBuffer (Nanite Proxy geometry)
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.HardwareRayTracing.NormalBias

entries.help: Determines whether a second trace will be fired for far-field contribution (Default = 1)
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.HardwareRayTracing.Retrace.FarField

entries.help: When the AvoidSelfIntersectionTrace is enabled, the first Two sided material hit within this distance will be skipped.  This is useful for avoiding self-intersections with the Nanite fallback mesh on foliage, as AvoidSelfIntersectionTrace doesn't work on two sided materials.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.HardwareRayTracing.SkipFirstTwoSidedHitDistance

entries.help: Whether to use Importance Sampling to generate probe trace directions.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ImportanceSample

entries.help: Resolution of the BRDF PDF octahedron per probe.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ImportanceSample.BRDFOctahedronResolution

entries.help: Whether to Importance Sample incoming lighting to generate probe trace directions.  When disabled, only the BRDF will be importance sampled.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ImportanceSample.IncomingLighting

entries.help: Minimum normalized BRDF PDF to trace rays for.  Larger values cause black corners, but reduce noise as more rays are able to be reassigned to an important direction.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ImportanceSample.MinPDFToTrace

entries.help: Number of refinement levels to use for screen probe importance sampling.  Currently only supported by the serial reference path in ScreenProbeGenerateRaysCS.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ImportanceSample.NumLevels

entries.help: Whether to Importance Sample incoming lighting from last frame's filtered traces to generate probe trace directions.  When disabled, the Radiance Cache will be used instead.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ImportanceSample.ProbeRadianceHistory

entries.help: Whether to inject local lights into probes.  Experimental - fast but causes wrap-around lighting due to lack of directionality and SH ringing.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.InjectLightsToProbes

entries.help: Whether to use tile classification during diffuse integration.  Tile Classification splits compute dispatches by VGPRs for better occupancy, but can introduce errors if implemented incorrectly.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.IntegrationTileClassification

entries.help: Prefilter irradiance format
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.IrradianceFormat

entries.help: Number of light samples per screen probe, in one dimension.  When the number of lights overlapping a pixel is larger, noise in the direct lighting will increase.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.LightSampleResolutionXY

entries.help: Whether to apply Material Ambient Occlusion or Material Bent Normal to Lumen GI.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.MaterialAO

entries.help: Clamps the maximum ray lighting intensity (with PreExposure) to reduce fireflies.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.MaxRayIntensity

entries.help: Maximum roughness value to evaluate rough specular in Screen Probe Gather.  Lower values reduce GPU cost of integration, but also lose rough specular.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.MaxRoughnessToEvaluateRoughSpecular

entries.help: Whether to enable the Persistent world space Radiance Cache
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.RadianceCache

entries.help: Base of the Pow() that controls the size of each successive clipmap relative to the first.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.RadianceCache.ClipmapDistributionBase

entries.help: World space extent of the first clipmap
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.RadianceCache.ClipmapWorldExtent

entries.help: Resolution of the probe placement grid within each clipmap
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.RadianceCache.GridResolution

entries.help: Number of radiance cache clipmaps.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.RadianceCache.NumClipmaps

entries.help: Number of radiance cache mipmaps.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.RadianceCache.NumMipmaps

entries.help: Number of probes along one dimension of the probe atlas cache texture.  This controls the memory usage of the cache.  Overflow currently results in incorrect rendering.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.RadianceCache.ProbeAtlasResolutionInProbes

entries.help: Resolution of the probe's 2d radiance layout.  The number of rays traced for the probe will be ProbeResolution ^ 2
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.RadianceCache.ProbeResolution

entries.help: GPU print out Radiance Cache update stats.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.RadianceCache.Stats

entries.help: When enabled, traces 1024 uniform rays per probe with no filtering, Importance Sampling or Radiance Caching.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ReferenceMode

entries.help: Whether to trace against the screen before falling back to other tracing methods.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ScreenTraces

entries.help: Whether to use HZB tracing for SSGI instead of fixed step count intersection.  HZB tracing is much more accurate, in particular not missing thin features, but is about ~3x slower.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ScreenTraces.HZBTraversal

entries.help: Whether the HZB traversal should go all the way down to the full resolution depth, which is more accurate but adds incoherency to the inner loop.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ScreenTraces.HZBTraversal.FullResDepth

entries.help: Distance between HZB trace hit and previous frame scene depth from which to allow hits, as a relative depth threshold.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ScreenTraces.HZBTraversal.HistoryDepthTestRelativeThickness

entries.help: Max iterations for HZB tracing.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ScreenTraces.HZBTraversal.MaxIterations

entries.help: Number of linear search steps to determine if a hit feature is thin and should be ignored.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ScreenTraces.HZBTraversal.NumThicknessStepsToDetermineCertainty

entries.help: Determines depth thickness of objects hit by HZB tracing, as a relative depth threshold.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ScreenTraces.HZBTraversal.RelativeDepthThickness

entries.help: Whether to allow screen traces to hit Subsurface and TwoSided Foliage shading models.  Can be used to work around aliasing from high frequency grass geometry.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ScreenTraces.HZBTraversal.SkipFoliageHits

entries.help: Minimum number of threads still tracing before aborting the trace.  Can be used for scalability to abandon traces that have a disproportionate cost.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ScreenTraces.MinimumOccupancy

entries.help: Larger scales effectively treat depth buffer surfaces as thicker for screen traces when there is no Distance Field present to resume the occluded ray.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ScreenTraces.ThicknessScaleWhenNoFallback

entries.help: Whether to compute a short range, full resolution AO to add high frequency occlusion (contact shadows) which Screen Probes lack due to downsampling.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ShortRangeAO

entries.help: Whether Screen Space Bent Normal should be applied during BRDF integration, which has higher quality but is before the temporal filter so causes streaking on moving objects.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ShortRangeAO.ApplyDuringIntegration

entries.help: Whether to trace against hair depth for hair casting shadow onto opaques.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ShortRangeAO.HairScreenTrace

entries.help: Whether to trace against hair voxel structure for hair casting shadow onto opaques.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ShortRangeAO.HairVoxelTrace

entries.help: 0. Screen space tracing for the full resolution Bent Normal (directional occlusion).1. Enable hardware ray tracing of the full resolution Bent Normal (directional occlusion). (Default)
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ShortRangeAO.HardwareRayTracing

entries.help: Bias for HWRT Bent Normal to avoid self intersection
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ShortRangeAO.HardwareRayTracing.NormalBias

entries.help: Maximum albedo used for the AO multi-bounce approximation.  Useful for forcing near-white albedo to have some occlusion.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ShortRangeAO.MaxMultibounceAlbedo

entries.help: Maximum strength of ScreenSpaceBentNormal occlusion on foliage and subsurface pixels.  Useful for reducing max occlusion to simulate subsurface scattering.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ShortRangeAO.ScreenSpace.FoliageOcclusionStrength

entries.help: Scales the slope threshold that screen space traces use to determine whether there was a hit.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.ShortRangeAO.ScreenSpace.SlopeCompareToleranceScale

entries.help: Experimental
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.SpatialFilterHalfKernelSize

entries.help: In Degrees.  Larger angles allow more filtering but lose contact shadows.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.SpatialFilterMaxRadianceHitAngle

entries.help: Number of spatial filter passes
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.SpatialFilterNumPasses

entries.help: Determines how far probes can be in world space while still filtering lighting
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.SpatialFilterPositionWeightScale

entries.help: Whether to spatially filter probe traces to reduce noise.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.SpatialFilterProbes

entries.help: Where to interpolate screen probes stochastically (1 sample) or bilinearly (4 samples)
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.StochasticInterpolation

entries.help: Whether to use a temporal filter
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.Temporal

entries.help: Whether to clear the history every frame for debugging
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.Temporal.ClearHistoryEveryFrame

entries.help: Relative distance threshold needed to discard last frame's lighting results.  Lower values reduce ghosting from characters when near a wall but increase flickering artifacts.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.Temporal.DistanceThreshold

entries.help: Whether to clamp history values to the current frame's screen space neighborhood, in areas around moving objects.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.Temporal.FastUpdateModeUseNeighborhoodClamp

entries.help: Maximum amount of fast-responding temporal filter to use when traces hit a moving object.  Values closer to 1 cause more noise, but also faster reaction to scene changes.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.Temporal.MaxFastUpdateModeAmount

entries.help: Lower values cause the temporal filter to propagate lighting changes faster, but also increase flickering from noise.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.Temporal.MaxFramesAccumulated

entries.help: Maximum angle that the history texel's normal can be from the current pixel to accept it's history lighting, in degrees.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.Temporal.NormalThreshold

entries.help: Whether to reject history lighting based on their normal.  Increases cost of the temporal filter but can reduce streaking especially around character feet.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.Temporal.RejectBasedOnNormal

entries.help: Whether to temporally filter probe traces to reduce noise.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.TemporalFilterProbes

entries.help: Display Lumen screen probe tile classification.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.TileDebugMode

entries.help: Whether to trace against Mesh Signed Distance fields for Lumen's Screen Probe Gather.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.TraceMeshSDFs

entries.help: Resolution of the tracing octahedron.  Determines how many traces are done per probe.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.TracingOctahedronResolution

entries.help: Whether to gather lighting along the backface for the Two Sided Foliage shading model, which adds some GPU cost.  The final lighting is then DiffuseColor * FrontfaceLighting + SubsurfaceColor * BackfaceLighting.  When disabled, SubsurfaceColor will simply be added to DiffuseColor instead.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.TwoSidedFoliageBackfaceDiffuse

entries.help: Whether to visualize traces for the center screen probe, useful for debugging
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.VisualizeTraces

entries.help: Whether to freeze updating the visualize trace data.  Note that no changes to cvars or shaders will propagate until unfrozen.
entries.name: r.Lumen.ScreenProbeGather.VisualizeTracesFreeze

entries.help: Roughness used to sample the skylight leaking cubemap.  A value of 0 gives no prefiltering of the skylight leaking, while larger values can be useful to hide sky features in the leaking.
entries.name: r.Lumen.SkylightLeaking.Roughness

entries.help: Whether Lumen is supported at all for the project, regardless of platform.  This can be used to avoid compiling shaders and other load time overhead.
entries.name: r.Lumen.Supported

entries.help: Amount to expand heightfield component bbox for card capture purposes.
entries.name: r.Lumen.SurfaceCache.HeightfieldCaptureMargin

entries.help: Whether to prefer dispatches in groups of 32 threads on HW which supports it (instead of standard 64).
entries.name: r.Lumen.ThreadGroupSize32

entries.help: Scales the tracing distance for all tracing methods and Lumen features, used by scalability.
entries.name: r.Lumen.TraceDistanceScale

entries.help: Whether Lumen should trace against Mesh Signed Distance fields.  When enabled, Lumen's Software Tracing will be more accurate, but scenes with high instance density (overlapping meshes) will have high tracing costs.  When disabled, lower resolution Global Signed Distance Field will be used instead.
entries.name: r.Lumen.TraceMeshSDFs

entries.help: Whether Lumen should trace against Mesh Signed Distance fields.  When enabled, Lumen's Software Tracing will be more accurate, but scenes with high instance density (overlapping meshes) will have high tracing costs.  When disabled, lower resolution Global Signed Distance Field will be used instead.
entries.name: r.Lumen.TraceMeshSDFs.Allow

entries.help: Max trace distance against Mesh Distance Fields and Heightfields.
entries.name: r.Lumen.TraceMeshSDFs.TraceDistance

entries.help: Size in Radiance Cache probes of the dithered transition region between clipmaps
entries.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyReflections.ClipmapFadeSize

entries.help: Whether to render Lumen Reflections on the frontmost layer of Translucent Surfaces.  Other layers will use the lower quality Radiance Cache method that can only produce glossy reflections.
entries.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyReflections.FrontLayer.Allow

entries.help: Whether to render Lumen Reflections on the frontmost layer of Translucent Surfaces.  Other layers will use the lower quality Radiance Cache method that can only produce glossy reflections.
entries.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyReflections.FrontLayer.Enable

entries.help: Whether to render Lumen Reflections on the frontmost layer of Translucent Surfaces.  Other layers will use the lower quality Radiance Cache method that can only produce glossy reflections.
entries.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyReflections.FrontLayer.EnableForProject

entries.help: Depth test threshold used to determine whether the fragments being rendered match the single layer that reflections were calculated for
entries.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyReflections.FrontLayer.RelativeDepthThreshold

entries.help: Downsample factor for marking translucent surfaces in the Lumen Radiance Cache.  Too low of factors will cause incorrect Radiance Cache coverage.  Should be a power of 2.
entries.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyReflections.MarkDownsampleFactor

entries.help: Whether to use the Radiance Cache to provide Lumen Reflections on Translucent Surfaces.
entries.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyReflections.RadianceCache

entries.help: Extra bias for radiance cache injection on translucent reflections
entries.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyReflections.RadianceCache.Bias

entries.help: Larger values treat the Radiance Cache lighting as more distant.
entries.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyReflections.ReprojectionRadiusScale

entries.help: Size of a cell in the translucency grid, in pixels.
entries.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyVolume.GridPixelSize

entries.help: Enables hardware ray tracing for Lumen translucency volume (Default = 1)
entries.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyVolume.HardwareRayTracing

entries.help: Whether to use the Radiance Cache for Translucency
entries.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyVolume.RadianceCache

entries.help: Base of the Pow() that controls the size of each successive clipmap relative to the first.
entries.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyVolume.RadianceCache.ClipmapDistributionBase

entries.help: World space extent of the first clipmap
entries.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyVolume.RadianceCache.ClipmapWorldExtent

entries.help: Whether to trace against the FarField representation
entries.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyVolume.RadianceCache.FarField

entries.help: Resolution of the probe placement grid within each clipmap
entries.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyVolume.RadianceCache.GridResolution

entries.help: Number of radiance cache mipmaps.
entries.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyVolume.RadianceCache.NumMipmaps

entries.help: Number of probes along one dimension of the probe atlas cache texture.  This controls the memory usage of the cache.  Overflow currently results in incorrect rendering.
entries.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyVolume.RadianceCache.ProbeAtlasResolutionInProbes

entries.help: Resolution of the probe's 2d radiance layout.  The number of rays traced for the probe will be ProbeResolution ^ 2
entries.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyVolume.RadianceCache.ProbeResolution

entries.help: GPU print out Radiance Cache update stats.
entries.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyVolume.RadianceCache.Stats

entries.help: Whether to use a spatial filter on the volume traces.
entries.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyVolume.SpatialFilter

entries.help: How many passes of the spatial filter to do
entries.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyVolume.SpatialFilter.NumPasses

entries.help: How much the history value should be weighted each frame.  This is a tradeoff between visible jittering and responsiveness.
entries.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyVolume.Temporal.HistoryWeight

entries.help: Whether to apply jitter to each frame's translucency GI computation, achieving temporal super sampling.
entries.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyVolume.Temporal.Jitter

entries.help: Whether to use temporal reprojection.
entries.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyVolume.TemporalReprojection

entries.help: Whether to ray trace from the translucency volume's voxels to gather indirect lighting.  Only makes sense to disable if TranslucencyVolume.RadianceCache is enabled.
entries.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyVolume.TraceFromVolume

entries.help: Resolution of the tracing octahedron.  Determines how many traces are done per voxel of the translucency lighting volume.
entries.name: r.Lumen.TranslucencyVolume.TracingOctahedronResolution

entries.help: Lumen scene visualization mode.
entries.name: r.Lumen.Visualize

entries.help: Visualize only a single card direction.
entries.name: r.Lumen.Visualize.CardPlacementDirection

entries.help: Visualize only a single card per mesh.
entries.name: r.Lumen.Visualize.CardPlacementIndex

entries.help: 0 - all
entries.name: r.Lumen.Visualize.CardPlacementLOD

entries.help: Whether to visualize primitive bounding boxes.
entries.name: r.Lumen.Visualize.CardPlacementPrimitives

entries.help: Visualize cone angle, in degrees.
entries.name: r.Lumen.Visualize.ConeAngle

entries.help: Cone step scale on sphere radius step size.
entries.name: r.Lumen.Visualize.ConeStepFactor

entries.help: Enables visualization of hardware ray tracing (Default = 1)
entries.name: r.Lumen.Visualize.HardwareRayTracing

entries.help: Determines whether a secondary traces will be bucketed for coherent material access (default = 1
entries.name: r.Lumen.Visualize.HardwareRayTracing.BucketMaterials

entries.help: Determines whether a second trace will be compacted before traversal (default = 1
entries.name: r.Lumen.Visualize.HardwareRayTracing.Compact

entries.help: Enables deferred material pipeline (Default = 1)
entries.name: r.Lumen.Visualize.HardwareRayTracing.DeferredMaterial

entries.help: Determines the tile dimension for material sorting (Default = 64)
entries.name: r.Lumen.Visualize.HardwareRayTracing.DeferredMaterial.TileDimension

entries.help: Determines the active group count when dispatching raygen shader (default = 4096
entries.name: r.Lumen.Visualize.HardwareRayTracing.GroupCount

entries.help: Determines whether a second trace will be fired for far-field contribution (default = 1
entries.name: r.Lumen.Visualize.HardwareRayTracing.Retrace.FarField

entries.help: Determines whether a second trace will be fired for hit-lighting for invalid surface-cache hits (default = 1
entries.name: r.Lumen.Visualize.HardwareRayTracing.Retrace.HitLighting

entries.help: Determines the active group count when dispatching raygen shader (default = 64
entries.name: r.Lumen.Visualize.HardwareRayTracing.ThreadCount

entries.help: Whether visualization should sample highest available surface data or use lowest res always resident pages.
entries.name: r.Lumen.Visualize.HiResSurface

entries.help: Visualize Lumen Indirect Diffuse.
entries.name: r.Lumen.Visualize.IndirectDiffuse

entries.help: Max trace distance for Lumen scene visualization rays. Values below 0 will automatically derrive this from cone angle.

entries.help: Visualize bounds for ray tracing groups. Control visualization distance using r.Lumen.Visualize.CardPlacementDistance.
entries.name: r.Lumen.Visualize.RayTracingGroups

entries.help: Whether visualization should write surface cache feedback requests into the feedback buffer.
entries.name: r.Lumen.Visualize.SurfaceCacheFeedback

entries.help: Whether to use Mesh SDF tracing for lumen scene visualization.
entries.name: r.Lumen.Visualize.TraceMeshSDFs

entries.help: Whether to use radiance cache for Lumen scene visualization.
entries.name: r.Lumen.Visualize.TraceRadianceCache

entries.help: Whether to sample cloud shadows when avaible.
entries.name: r.LumenScene.DirectLighting.CloudTransmittance

entries.help: Bias for tracing global SDF shadow rays.
entries.name: r.LumenScene.DirectLighting.GlobalSDF.ShadowRayBias

entries.help: Enables hardware ray tracing for Lumen direct lighting (Default = 1)
entries.name: r.LumenScene.DirectLighting.HardwareRayTracing

entries.help: Determines the dispatch group count
entries.name: r.LumenScene.DirectLighting.HardwareRayTracing.GroupCount

entries.help: Applies a projection bias such that an occlusion ray starts on the ray-tracing heightfield representation.
entries.name: r.LumenScene.DirectLighting.HardwareRayTracing.HeightfieldProjectionBias

entries.help: Determines the search radius for heightfield projection bias. Larger search radius corresponds to increased traversal cost (default = 256).
entries.name: r.LumenScene.DirectLighting.HardwareRayTracing.HeightfieldProjectionBiasSearchRadius

entries.help: Enables indirect dispatch for hardware ray tracing (Default = 1)
entries.name: r.LumenScene.DirectLighting.HardwareRayTracing.Indirect

entries.help: Bias for hardware ray tracing shadow rays.
entries.name: r.LumenScene.DirectLighting.HardwareRayTracing.ShadowRayBias

entries.help: Bias for tracing heightfield shadow rays.
entries.name: r.LumenScene.DirectLighting.Heightfield.ShadowRayBias

entries.help: Max number of lights to pick per tile based on their intenstiy and attenuation. Valid values are 4/8/16/32. Increasing this value will cause more memory usage and will slow down Lumen surface cache direct lighting pass.
entries.name: r.LumenScene.DirectLighting.MaxLightsPerTile

entries.help: Bias for tracing mesh SDF shadow rays.
entries.name: r.LumenScene.DirectLighting.MeshSDF.ShadowRayBias

entries.help: Whether to trace against Mesh Signed Distance Fields for offscreen shadowing, or to trace against the lower resolution Global SDF.
entries.name: r.LumenScene.DirectLighting.OffscreenShadowing.TraceMeshSDFs

entries.help: Controls for how many texels direct lighting will be updated every frame. Texels = SurfaceCacheTexels / Factor.
entries.name: r.LumenScene.DirectLighting.UpdateFactor

entries.help: 0: off, 1: on, 2: only on if r.LumenScene.FastCameraMode is enabled
entries.name: r.LumenScene.DistantScene

entries.help: LOD bias for Nanite geometry in Lumen distant scene representation. 0 - full detail. > 0 - reduced detail.
entries.name: r.LumenScene.DistantScene.NaniteLODBias

entries.help: Todo - shader only supports 1 cascade
entries.name: r.LumenScene.DistantScene.NumCascades

entries.help: Whether to log Lumen scene stats on the next frame. 2 - dump mesh DF. 3 - dump LumenScene objects.
entries.name: r.LumenScene.DumpStats

entries.help: Enable/Disable Lumen far-field ray tracing.

entries.help: Starting distance for far-field dithered t-min, as a percentage of near-field t-max (Default = 0.66f).

entries.name: r.RHICmdFlushRenderThreadTasksPrePass

entries.help: 0: Disable temporal accumulation

entries.help: Render the scene in n frames (i.e TileCount) - Ignored in Perspective mode, works only in Orthographic mode and when r.SceneCapture.OverrideOrthographicTilingValues is on.
